onboarding.desc1: Each asset sits in its own independent SPV — complete legal separation that protects your investment.
onboarding.desc2: Access a diversified world of opportunities — real estate, technology, AI, gold and more — from a single account.
onboarding.desc3: A regulated internal secondary market lets you sell your shares and exit with full flexibility.
onboarding.desc4: Every asset is rated by trusted global valuation firms — neutral, transparent assessments.
onboarding.desc5: Comprehensive insurance coverage on every asset and every SPV, for full peace of mind.
onboarding.desc6: Multiple payment options built in — fiat currencies and crypto.
onboarding.desc7: Pay with Pronova (PRN) and get an instant 5% bonus, plus access to the wider Capimax Group ecosystem.
onboarding.desc8: Access interest-free financing in Pronova (PRN) through Nova Digital Finance — buy tokens at 1 PRN = 1 USD and invest via CapiMax.
onboarding.desc9: Every document is verified and held by a global custodian — CIM Financial Group.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions
faq.question1: What is the role of Capimax?
faq.answer1: Capimax, as a diversified asset platform, builds and operates assets across various sectors. It allows owners to participate in these activities through small shares without bearing the burdens of management, risks, establishment, taxes, or fees. The company handles these burdens, so owners simply subscribe to buy in, then track their holdings through the platform, withdraw returns, and eventually withdraw the principal amount upon contract completion.
faq.question2: What are the benefits and profits?
faq.answer2: The profits are high and rewarding compared to the absence of any risks and compared to profits in any other field. The benefits include high profits, ease of entry and exit from your holdings, insured assets with an insurance policy, easy money retrieval without fees, and a diversified portfolio.
faq.question3: What is the difference between owning real estate through Capimax and buying property directly?
faq.answer3: Owning real estate through Capimax offers the advantage of net profit without the burdens of management, commissions, fees, property management issues, and market fluctuations. It suits any owner's budget without requiring large amounts and is insured. On the other hand, actual property involves large amounts, commissions, registration fees, property management and maintenance costs, and market fluctuations.
faq.question4: What is the difference between owning gold assets and buying physical gold?
faq.answer4: Owning gold assets through Capimax offers high net profit, is insured, and is easy to sell or transfer, without storage burdens, fees, or market fluctuations. Physical gold ownership involves market fluctuations, storage needs, fees, and manufacturing costs.
faq.question5: What is the difference between investment certificates and Capimax asset offerings?
faq.answer5: Asset offerings with Capimax offer high net profit without fees, and you can withdraw without fees or breaking your holding, receiving profits up to the withdrawal date. Investment certificates involve breaking fees, loss of profits, and no high returns.
faq.question6: What factors affect the choice of asset offerings?
faq.answer6: The difference depends on three things: type, duration, and contract type. You choose the asset offering based on your circumstances and consultation with your account manager, considering your financial capacity, ownership purpose, duration, and return system.
faq.answer7: Contact your account manager or customer service for assistance, or visit the website or app to browse available assets, fill out the form, and submit the required data and information.
faq.answer8: There are multiple payment methods: (1) Online payment gateway on the website and within the purchase request, (2) Transfer to the company's account and attach the transfer image or number, (3) You will receive a payment link.
faq.question9: How do I get the contract after signing it electronically?
faq.answer9: You will find all your purchase documents in your profile under 'My Documents' and also receive them via the registered email.
faq.question10: How do I verify or download the contract online?
faq.answer10: In your profile, you will find a link on the website to inquire and download the documents.
faq.question11: How do I get the insurance policy?
faq.answer11: When buying into assets, it will be indicated if they are insured. The company will insure on your behalf, and the insurance company will send the policy to your registered email.
faq.question12: How do I verify or download the insurance policy?
faq.answer12: The company provides a link to inquire and download the documents.
faq.answer13: An open contract allows the owner to exit at any time, transfer their holding, or withdraw immediately without fees or burdens, and collect profits up to the exit date.
faq.answer14: A closed contract requires the owner to remain until the end of the term but allows selling or transferring the contract while maintaining its conditions for the new owner.
faq.question15: What is the difference between open and closed contracts?
faq.answer15: The open contract has its conditions and benefits with lower profits but allows immediate withdrawal. The closed contract offers higher profits but requires waiting until the end of the term. Both can be transferred or sold to others.
faq.question16: What should I do if I want to sell?
faq.answer16: Submit a request from your profile to sell to others or the company. If selling to others, provide their details, and the process will be completed within 24 hours.
faq.question17: What should I do if I want to withdraw funds?
faq.answer17: Submit a withdrawal request from your profile, and it will be approved within 24 hours. The amount will be transferred to the account in your profile. If you want to change the account, update it, and the transfer will be made to the new account.
faq.question18: What factors influence the choice of assets?
faq.answer18: Type of asset, risk, duration, contract type, and owner needs.
faq.question19: Is ownership available in any country?
faq.question20: Is ownership available with companies or individuals?
faq.answer20: Available with both individuals and companies.
faq.question21: Are there any requirements for ownership and owners?
faq.answer21: Requirements are specified in the requirements file.
